---
title: 'Tweet From DarrellWolfe January 05, 2014 at 06:11AM'
date: '2014-01-05T12:19:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2838573939372212330'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/tweet-from-darrellwolfe-january-05-2014_67.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Twitter'
---

<div xmlns='http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml'><blockquote class='twitter-tweet'><br /><p>If someone makes you angry, you may be angry at yourself but it's easier to blame others vs self correct. <a href='https://twitter.com/search?q=%23DW&amp;src=hash'>#DW</a> </p><br />— Darrell G Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href='https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/statuses/419803239950065664'>January 5, 2014</a> </blockquote><br /><script type='text/javascript' charset='utf-8' src='//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js' async=''><br /></script><br/><br /><br/><br />January 05, 2014 at 06:11AM<br/><br />via <a href='https://ifttt.com/?ref=da&amp;site=blogger'>IFTTT</a></div>
